input: A documentary following a Thai grandmother in Chiang Mai who teaches her granddaughter traditional recipes passed down for four generations, exploring how food preserves culture as the city modernizes.

An explainer video for a B2B SaaS platform that helps remote teams run async standups. Show the problem of meeting fatigue, introduce the product workflow, and end with a clear call to action for team leads.
A woman discovers her new neighbor has been mirroring her daily routine. When she confronts him, she learns he is not stalking her — he is trying to warn her that someone else already is.
A coming-of-age drama about a high school senior named John who navigates family expectations, first love, and choosing a career path in a small suburban American town.
targetAudience: Thai teenagers and young adults in Thailand
note: Deliberately Western-coded treatment (protagonist 'John', American suburb) with a Thai audience. A good cultural analysis must flag the cultural mismatch (names, setting, customs) and recommend Thai-specific fixes.

audienceDefinition.description: Thai teenagers and young adults in Thailand who love heartfelt local coming-of-age stories rooted in Thai family values and Buddhist culture.
